name: STING — Title-block family library
description: Generator spec for STING title-block .rfa families. Two-family BIM architecture: each working-sheet paper size ships in BOTH landscape and portrait orientations × BIM/NONBIM modes (5 × 2 × 2 = 20 working sheets), plus 14 specialty title blocks (4 fabrication assembly + 2 presentation + cover + divider + register + transmittal cover + 3 submission + clarification). Every concrete family extends a size+orientation abstract common which itself extends A1_common_v2.0 — the master identity-data parameter universe. Parameter set follows TITLE_BLOCK_FAMILY_DESIGN.md §2.1 — all shared params sourced from MR_PARAMETERS.txt, no fabricated GUIDs.

families.description: A1 landscape working sheet — common base shared between BIM and NONBIM variants. Parameter set per TITLE_BLOCK_FAMILY_DESIGN.md §2.1 — Group A (project / originator / consultants / contractor identity + addresses) + Group C (authoring drawn/checked/approved). Defines the bottom-strip layout, outer border, and the 8 viewport slots. Concrete variants extend this and overlay BIM-specific or NONBIM-specific cells.

slots.description: Main drawing area — full-bleed plan / 3D / section

families.description: A1 landscape working sheet — full ISO 19650 BIM identity. Adds the 7-segment sheet ID strip, suitability chip + descriptive label, status band, revision-history register, federation status, LOIN/LOD, transmittal/CDE references, and the 4-eyes AUTHORISED BY signature row over the common base.

A1 landscape working sheet — minimal non-BIM identity. Reuses the common identity-data + drawn/checked/approved block but skips the ISO-19650 sheet ID, suitability chip, and revision-history register. Sheet number is bound via PRJ_TB_SHEET_NR_TXT (the existing simple sheet identifier).
A0 landscape working sheet (1189 × 841 mm) — common base shared between BIM and NONBIM. Inherits the full identity-data parameter universe from A1_common_v2.0 and adds geometry sized for this paper.

slots.description: Main drawing area — full-bleed plan / 3D / section (A0 landscape)
